ffet_definition: one FFET maps to exactly one seed/sub-surface unless explicit merge_rationale proves inseparability

ffets.title: Platform Core Update Baseline
ffets.blocker_reason: P6A-CONTROL-002 could not derive seed-specific exact writable files, runtime MCR, and validation commands from accepted repo truth without creating new scaffold/runtime architecture inside a planning PR.
ffets.minimum_concrete_requirement: BLOCKED: no non-documentation runtime MCR can be assigned until seed-specific runtime/control ownership is accepted on main.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact files cannot be named from accepted repo truth.
Stop if assigning files would overlap another Phase 6A seed.
Stop if runtime MCR would be documentation-only.
Stop if a scaffold, contract, schema, permission, API, event, ADL, or service-boundary decision is required.
Stop if resolving the blocker would require changing apps/packages/prisma/generated/scripts/package files in this docs-only PR.
ffets.required_control_resolution: Create and accept a separate Phase 6A control/scaffold implementation plan or PR that defines seed-specific ownership and validation surfaces before FFET promotion.

ffets.minimum_concrete_requirement: BLOCKED: no non-documentation runtime MCR can be assigned until seed-specific runtime/control ownership is accepted on main.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact files cannot be named from accepted repo truth.
Stop if assigning files would overlap another Phase 6A seed.
Stop if runtime MCR would be documentation-only.
Stop if a scaffold, contract, schema, permission, API, event, ADL, or service-boundary decision is required.
Stop if resolving the blocker would require changing apps/packages/prisma/generated/scripts/package files in this docs-only PR.
ffets.required_control_resolution: Create and accept a separate Phase 6A control/scaffold implementation plan or PR that defines seed-specific ownership and validation surfaces before FFET promotion.
